name: Aldric

1: Don't bother hiding, beast. I'll be done before supper.
They said this dungeon was dangerous. They lied — as they always do.
Watch closely, monster. This is what a real hero looks like.
2: You butchered my classmates. Every one of them had a name. You'll learn mine before the end.
I am not the boy who stumbled out of here. I came back for YOU.
Laugh now. I've spent a year learning exactly how you die.
3: I haven't slept. I've memorized every stone of this pit. There is NOTHING left you can show me.
Do you know how many nights I gave to learning your filth? Tonight it pays.
Last time cost me an eye. I've come to collect the rest of you.
4: The crown has named me its Champion. I am the realm's last hope — and your last sunrise.
I came as a student. I return as a king. Kneel, or fall.
Every soul you slew, I carry into this throne room. They will watch you end.

tauntBoss: Is this truly the best the dark can offer?
Cower in your hole. I'll be at your throne by sundown.
Every step deeper is one step closer to your end, monster.
Send your little pets. I'll send them back in pieces.
banterCompanion: And YOU — consorting with this thing? Have you no shame, creature?
Tell your master to run. Actually — tell her I said she has dreadful taste.
Smile while you can, demon. I've cut down prettier monsters than you.
When I've slain your lord, perhaps I'll let you live to mourn. Perhaps.
minionKill: Another of your slaves returned to dust. Send more.
I could do this in my sleep — and some nights, I have.
hurt: A scratch. You'll have to do better.
Grrh — fine. FINE. Now I'm actually trying.

1: This isn't over, beast. I'm only getting warmed up.
Enjoy tonight. I'll be back — and far better.
2: Remember my face, monster. You'll see it again.
I retreat. I do NOT surrender. There is a difference you'll come to dread.
3: Next time I walk out of here, it will be over your corpse.
Bind your wounds. Mine are already healing into something worse for you.

1: Aldric escaped your dungeon, vowing to return stronger.
The young swordsman fled — but he was smiling.
2: Aldric withdrew again, his eyes colder than before.
He left no boast this time. Only a promise.
3: Aldric vanished into the dark, muttering of a crown.
Word spreads: the kingdom means to name its Champion.

opener: No more games, monster. No more dungeon to hide behind. Just you, me, and the end of all evil.
This is the moment I was forged for. Try to make it worthy.
mid: You're stronger than the rumors. Good. A true hero needs a true monster.
Is that fear I see? In a thing like you? Delicious.
low: No — NO. I am the HERO. The hero does not LOSE!
I did not come this far to KNEEL!
victory: Evil ends here. As I always promised it would.
Rest now, monster. The realm is free of you.
defeat: ...How. I did everything right. I was supposed to be...
Tell them... tell them I tried to be great...
